meaning: n.绉绘皯,绉绘,绉诲線,绉诲姩
examples: During the last recession, migration to the sunbelt accelerated.
Now, migration is a natural survival strategy.
They have led some birds to give up on migration.
More than half the rise in the population of England and Wales was due to migration.
And musicians come to hear the age-old songs with fifteen-syllable lines and themes of migration and survival.
